final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: editorial documentary photography
Primary request: morning prayer ceremony at Varanasi's Ganges River ghats with hundreds of Hindu devotees
Scene/backdrop: ancient stone ghats along the Ganges River at dawn, misty atmosphere, distant riverbank silhouette
Subject: elderly priest in orange saffron robes holding a brass oil lamp, surrounded by devotees bathing in river, praying with folded hands, floating offerings
Style/medium: documentary film photography, rich saturated colors, film grain texture
Composition/framing: golden ratio composition, shallow depth of field with blurred flower petals in foreground, priest as mid-ground subject, riverbank silhouette in background
Lighting/mood: warm golden sunrise light from horizon, ethereal smoke from ritual fires, spiritual and reverent atmosphere
Color palette: warm golden sunrise tones, orange saffron robes, copper brass accents, soft blue river reflections
Materials/textures: weathered stone ghats, flowing water surface with floating marigold offerings, brass oil lamps, billowing incense smoke
Constraints: maintain documentary authenticity, preserve the scale of hundreds of devotees, keep the priest as central focal point
Avoid: oversaturated HDR look, plastic skin textures, modern clothing anachronisms, watermark, oversharpening
